a:r.a:t: Tendons of flexor digitorum longus attach to the bases of the distal phalanges.
Tendons of flexor digitorum brevis attach to middle phalanges.
Tendons of extensor digitorum longus attach to bases of middle and distal phalanges.
Dorsal and plantar interossei attach to proximal phalanx.
Flexor and abductor digiti minimi attach to base of 5
